feedback.text: Publishers permanently disabling video games they have already sold. Some publishers are selling video games under terms that may already violate Directive 93/13/EEC and deliberately prevent customers from retaining or repairing their purchase. Games people have bought and have been sold by publishers have been with without a fair amount of warning been de-listed and are now unobtainable. Large list of games that not necessarily was Online multiplayer only. https://stopkillinggames.wiki.gg/wiki/Dead_game_list Payment processors (Visa & Mastercard) is also pushing censorship on video games that are legal. They should not be allowed to censor anything that's 100% legal in the EU.
